default.description: Architected a multi-cloud foundation across GCP, AWS, and Azure, establishing SRE practices and IaC-driven infrastructure governance at enterprise scale.
default.challenge: Saturated data centers and legacy infrastructure constrained scalability, speed-to-market, and operational resilience.
default.solution: Achieved faster IT environment provisioning, enterprise-scale infrastructure elasticity, and dramatically improved system uptime — replacing legacy constraints with cloud-native resilience and business continuity.

default.description: Delivered an event-driven, ML-powered fraud detection platform processing 4,000+ transactions per second, reducing annual fraud losses by over $10M for one of America's largest credit card issuers.
default.challenge: A top-3 US credit card brand needed to combat increasingly sophisticated fraud at scale while migrating 50TB of legacy data without disrupting live transaction processing for 40M+ active cardholders.
default.solution: Achieved >$10M annual fraud reduction, 42% faster case resolution, and >90% alert accuracy by deploying real-time Kafka streaming, ML-based scoring, and cognitive case management on AWS cloud infrastructure.

default.metric: From Legacy Silos to Cloud-Powered Data Intelligence
default.description: Migrated a regional bank's legacy data infrastructure to Azure cloud, consolidating siloed data into a unified lake and warehouse architecture with a tailored governance framework.
default.challenge: A leading regional bank was constrained by legacy systems, data silos, and manual processes that hindered agility, slowed decision-making, and challenged regulatory compliance.
default.solution: Delivered a modern Azure-based data platform that streamlined operations, unified enterprise data assets, enabled advanced analytics and data science capabilities.

default.metric: GenAI Knowledge Assistant for Contact Centers
default.description: Built a GenAI-powered Knowledge Assistant using Amazon Q and AWS S3, equipping contact center agents with instant, accurate, and compliant responses to member queries.
default.challenge: A leading credit union's contact center agents struggled with manual knowledge searches across disparate sources, resulting in slow response times and diminished member satisfaction.
default.solution: Delivered instant, contextually accurate responses for contact center agents, boosting productivity and member satisfaction while establishing a compliant, scalable GenAI foundation.

default.metric: Optimized digital lending experience with secure scale
default.description: Managed end-to-end production support and feature enhancements for a complex Temenos-based consumer lending platform.
default.challenge: Balancing critical platform stability with rapid customization of state-specific digital lending forms and secure SSO integrations.
default.solution: Achieved seamless integration of customized loan forms, implemented robust SSO-based security, and ensured 100% operational continuity through dedicated production support.
